title: 日本ダービーの後に・笑い泣きの栄冠

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite trembling with fear throughout the race,
Tamamo Cross wins the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But a sense of relief overpowers the joy of
victory. Still reeling from the accident, she
obtains this win with a heavy price...
